member.name: T:AuditX.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:AuditX.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:AuditX.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:AuditX.My.Resources.Resources.AVSA_icon
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:AuditX.My.Resources.Resources.settings__1_
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: M:AuditX.Home.AddLogRow(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a row with status-based coloring

member.name: M:AuditX.Home.txtFilter_TextChanged(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Filter logs dynamically

member.name: M:AuditX.Home.InitializeListView
member.summary: Configures the ListViewDiagnostics control columns and appearance. Only needs to run once; guarded by aboutLoaded flag upstream.

member.name: M:AuditX.Home.PopulateDiagnosticsListView(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Clears and repopulates the diagnostics ListView from the provided dictionary.

member.name: M:AuditX.Home.GetDiagnosticData
member.summary: Collects application, runtime, hardware, and health diagnostic data. Designed to run safely on a background thread.

member.name: M:AuditX.Home.BuildDiagnosticReport
member.summary: Builds a formatted diagnostic report string from the current ListView contents. Shared by both Copy and Export actions to eliminate duplication.

member.name: M:AuditX.Home.BuildResultTable(System.Data.DataTable,System.DateTime,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Builds the filtered result DataTable from raw USR02 data. FIX: Handles ERDAT = "00000000", blank USTYP, and removed the 15-day creation filter that was silently dropping users.

member.name: M:AuditX.Home.BuildMultiSystemResultTable(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Data.DataTable},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.DateTime,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds a cross-system merged result table. FIX: Each system's data is read independently using its own DataRow — no column name conflicts between systems. A user appears if they pass filters in AT LEAST ONE system.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPConnection.Shutdown
member.summary: FIX: Safely dispose _db even if Dispose throws

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPConnection.GetParameters(System.String)
member.summary: FIX: Added required field validation before building parameters

member.name: T:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase
member.summary: Handles all SQLite database operations for SAP System configurations. Uses System.Data.SQLite which fully supports Any CPU on .NET Framework 4.8

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the database helper and ensures schema exists.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.InitializeDatabase
member.summary: Creates the database schema if it does not already exist.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.GetCreateTableScript
member.summary: Returns the DDL script to create the SapSystems table.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.GetAllSystems
member.summary: Retrieves all SAP systems from the database. Passwords are returned in their encrypted (stored) form.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.GetSystem(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a single SAP system by name. Returns Nothing if not found. Password is returned in encrypted (stored) form.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.SystemExists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether a system name already exists in the database.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.InsertSystem(System.String,AuditX.SAPSystem)
member.summary: Inserts a new SAP system. Password must already be encrypted.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.UpdateSystem(System.String,System.String,AuditX.SAPSystem)
member.summary: Updates an existing SAP system. Handles rename atomically via a transaction. Password must already be encrypted.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.DeleteSystem(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a SAP system by name. Returns True if a record was deleted.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.GetSystemCount
member.summary: Returns the total count of SAP systems stored in the database.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.AddSystemParameters(System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteCommand,System.String,AuditX.SAPSystem)
member.summary: Adds standard SAP system parameters to a SQLite command.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.ValidateSystemArguments(System.String,AuditX.SAPSystem)
member.summary: Validates that system name and system object are not null or empty.

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.SanitizeSystemNumber(System.String)
member.summary: Ensures SystemNumber is stored as exactly 2 numeric digits. "0" → "00", "2" → "02", "00" → "00"

member.name: M:AuditX.SAPSystemDatabase.MigrateSystemNumbers
member.summary: One-time migration: ensures all stored SystemNumber values are exactly 2 digits. Safe to call on every startup.

member.name: M:AuditX.SecurityHelpers.EncryptString(System.String)
member.summary: Encrypts a plaintext string using DPAPI (CurrentUser). Returns base64 ciphertext.

member.name: M:AuditX.SecurityHelpers.DecryptString(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to decrypt a base64 ciphertext previously created with . If decryption fails (value was plain text or corrupted) the original value is returned.

member.name: M:AuditX.MultiSystemSelectionForm.S(System.Int32)
member.summary: Scales a pixel value by the current DPI factor.

member.name: M:AuditX.MultiSystemSelectionForm.DetectDpi
member.summary: Detects DPI from the current screen and stores scale factor.

member.name: M:AuditX.MultiSystemSelectionForm.SF(System.String,System.Single,System.Drawing.FontStyle)
member.summary: Returns a DPI-scaled Font.

member.name: F:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm._systems
member.summary: In-memory cache of all loaded SAP systems with decrypted passwords.

member.name: F:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm._db
member.summary: Database access layer.

member.name: F:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm._isEditing
member.summary: Tracks whether the form is currently in Add or Edit mode.

member.name: F:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm._originalName
member.summary: Holds the original system name before an edit or rename operation.

member.name: F:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm._statusCts
member.summary: Background cancellation for status refresh.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.InitializeStatusGrid
member.summary: Initializes the dgvSystemStatus DataGridView columns and appearance.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.LoadSystems
member.summary: Loads all systems from the SQLite database into the in-memory cache and refreshes the UI combo box and status grid.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.RefreshComboBox(System.String)
member.summary: Repopulates the combo box from the in-memory systems dictionary.

member.name: T:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.SystemStatusRow
member.summary: Holds one row of data for the system status grid. Uses Public Sub New() and Properties for BindingList compatibility.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.PopulateStatusGrid
member.summary: Builds the status grid rows from the in-memory systems dictionary. All rows start with Status = "Checking..." until background ping completes. CRITICAL: Always sets DataSource = Nothing before clearing or repopulating.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.UpdateSystemStatusRow(System.String,System.Boolean,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Updates the Status and LastChecked columns for a specific system row. Modifies the BindingList items directly — the grid auto-refreshes. Must be called on the UI thread.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.ApplyRowStyles
member.summary: Applies alternating row styles to rows that have not been coloured by status check.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.UpdateStatusSummary
member.summary: Updates the summary label below the status grid.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.CancelStatusRefresh
member.summary: Cancels any in-progress status refresh.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.StartStatusRefresh
member.summary: Starts a background task that pings each configured SAP system and updates the status grid row by row as results come in.

member.name: M:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.PingSystem(System.String,AuditX.SAPSystem)
member.summary: Attempts to ping a single SAP system using a temporary destination config. Returns True if the ping succeeds. Called from a background thread.

member.name: T:AuditX.RFCSettingsForm.SingleDestinationConfig
member.summary: Temporary IDestinationConfiguration used only during connection test.

member.name: P:AuditX.ITGC18.ParameterRule.AcceptedStringValues
member.summary: Optional list of accepted string values (e.g., "0", "false", "off") If populated, these are checked directly BEFORE numeric comparison. Used for parameters like sapgui/user_scripting that may return TRUE/FALSE or 1/0

member.name: M:AuditX.ITGC18.CaptureSAPWindow
member.summary: Captures the SAP window screenshot

member.name: M:AuditX.ITGC18.ReadCurrentValueViaOCR(System.String)
member.summary: Reads Current Value using OCR by capturing the screen and parsing

member.name: M:AuditX.ITGC18.ParseCurrentValueFromOcr(System.String)
member.summary: Enhanced parser - handles multi-line OCR output

member.name: M:AuditX.FileUtils.GetUniqueFileName(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a unique file name by appending (1), (2), etc., before the extension if needed.
member.param: The folder where the file should be saved
member.returns: Full file path with unique name

member.name: M:AuditX.MouseHoverHandler.ApplyHoverEffect(System.Windows.Forms.Control,System.Drawing.Color,System.Windows.Forms.Cursor,System.Drawing.Size)
member.summary: Applies hover effect to a control. Includes background color, cursor, optional size increase.
member.param: Control to apply hover effect to

member.name: M:AuditX.ResponsiveModule.MakeResponsive(System.Windows.Forms.Form,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Call this in Form_Load - Makes form fully responsive

member.name: M:AuditX.ResponsiveModule.ResetResponsive(System.Windows.Forms.Form)
member.summary: Call this after dynamically adding/removing controls

member.name: M:AuditX.ResponsiveModule.Exclude(System.Windows.Forms.Form,System.Windows.Forms.Control)
member.summary: Exclude a control from responsive scaling

member.name: M:AuditX.ResponsiveModule.GetScale(System.Windows.Forms.Form)
member.summary: Get current scale of a form

member.name: M:AuditX.ResponsiveModule.HandleSpecial(System.Windows.Forms.Control,System.Single)
member.summary: Handle DataGridView, ListView columns etc.

member.name: M:AuditX.Logger.InitializeLog(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the log file path with control ID and current user

member.name: M:AuditX.Logger.LogMessage(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes a message to the log file with timestamp
member.param: True for success, False for error

member.name: M:AuditX.Logger.LogException(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Logs an exception with full details (message, source, stacktrace)

member.name: M:AuditX.Logger.OpenLogFolder
member.summary: Opens the log folder (C:\Void\Logs) in File Explorer

member.name: M:AuditX.Logger.CreateFolderPath(System.String)
member.summary: Ensures the full folder path exists by creating missing directories
